name.description: OPTIONAL operator-supplied display label (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.7). The server mints the opaque group_id; the caller never supplies it. Display-name well-formedness (length, charset) and reserved-name rejection (`admins`, `orchestrators`) are enforced server-side → 422 eden://error/invalid-name; an ill-formed name is NOT a request-validation (400) failure.

items.description: Member id — a worker_id (wkr_*) or a group_id (grp_*) (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §1.6).
